sources_method: RPP: BEA official MARPP download (MARPP_MSA_2008_2024.csv inside apps.bea.gov zip), all-items index, US=100. FMR: HUD FY2026 revised FMR file (huduser.gov), 2-bedroom, effective Oct 1 2025. Unemployment: BLS LAUS via public API, metro NSA rate, May 2026. VAMC: va.gov facility pages.

vamc.name: Audie L. Murphy Memorial Veterans' Hospital (VA South Texas Health Care System)

metros.notes: San Antonio-New Braunfels, TX MSA / HUD Metro FMR Area. Unemployment cross-checked against BLS Southwest regional release (4.1% May 2026).

vamc.name: Dallas VA Medical Center (VA North Texas Health Care System)

metros.notes: RPP and unemployment are for the full Dallas-Fort Worth-Arlington, TX MSA. HUD splits the metroplex: Dallas HMFA 2BR = $1,931 (shown); Fort Worth-Arlington HMFA 2BR = $1,723 (same HUD file). System also includes Garland VA Medical Center and Fort Worth outpatient clinics.

vamc.name: James A. Haley Veterans' Hospital (VA Tampa Health Care System)

No VAMC in the metro — outpatient clinics only (Jacksonville 1, Jacksonville 2, Jacksonville North VA Clinics). Nearest full VA medical center: Malcom Randall VAMC, Gainesville (VA North Florida/South Georgia Health Care System)

metros.notes: Jacksonville, FL MSA / HUD Metro FMR Area. Confirms the dataset's CBOC-only characterization: Jacksonville hosts multi-specialty VA outpatient clinics; inpatient VAMCs for the system are in Gainesville and Lake City, FL.

vamc.name: Carl T. Hayden Veterans' Administration Medical Center (VA Phoenix Health Care System)
Joseph Maxwell Cleland Atlanta VA Medical Center (Decatur, GA — VA Atlanta Health Care System)
Nashville VA Medical Center (VA Tennessee Valley Healthcare System)

metros.notes: Nashville-Davidson--Murfreesboro--Franklin, TN MSA / HMFA. System also includes Alvin C. York VA Medical Center in Murfreesboro, inside the same metro.

vamc.name: Jennifer Moreno Department of Veterans Affairs Medical Center (La Jolla — VA San Diego Healthcare System)
Rocky Mountain Regional VA Medical Center (Aurora, CO — VA Eastern Colorado Health Care System)
Seattle VA Medical Center (VA Puget Sound Health Care System; second campus: American Lake VA Medical Center, Tacoma)

metros.notes: RPP and unemployment are for the Seattle-Tacoma-Bellevue, WA MSA. HUD splits the metro: Seattle-Bellevue HMFA 2BR = $2,501 (shown); Tacoma HMFA 2BR = $1,971 (same HUD file). American Lake VAMC page: https://www.va.gov/puget-sound-health-care/locations/american-lake-va-medical-center/
